auth.label: API Access Token
auth.description: Sender API access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or manage it in Sender account settings: https://app.sender.net/settings/tokens.

actions.name: add_subscribers_to_group
actions.description: Add subscribers or a Sender conditions selection to a group.

subscribers.description: Email addresses to add or remove from the group.

conditions.description: Sender conditions expression for selecting subscribers.

trigger_automation.description: Whether Sender should trigger automations for newly added subscribers.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding subscribers to a Sender group.

success.description: Whether Sender accepted the group membership change.

outputSchema.description: A Sender group membership mutation response.

actions.name: create_field
actions.description: Create a Sender custom subscriber field.

title.description: The display title of the custom field.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Sender custom field.

default.description: Whether this is a default Sender field.

actions.name: create_subscriber
actions.description: Create a Sender subscriber with optional groups and custom fields.

groups.description: Sender group IDs assigned to the subscriber.

additionalProperties.description: A custom field value accepted by Sender.

fields.description: Custom field values keyed by Sender field name.

phone.description: The subscriber phone number with country code.

trigger_automation.description: Whether Sender should trigger automations for this change.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Sender subscriber.

success.description: Whether Sender accepted the subscriber change.

created.description: When Sender created the subscriber record.

anyOf.description: When the subscriber bounced, when present.
When the subscriber unsubscribed, when present.

location.description: Location details returned by Sender, when present.

items.description: A Sender group tag attached to a subscriber.

columns.description: Custom field values returned by Sender.

actions.name: get_campaign
actions.description: Get one Sender campaign by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for getting one Sender campaign.

anyOf.description: When the campaign is scheduled, when present.

last_action.description: The last campaign action recorded by Sender.

anyOf.description: When the campaign was sent, when present.

modified.description: When Sender last modified the campaign.

sent_count.description: Total sent emails reported by Sender.

campaign_groups.description: Group IDs targeted by the campaign.

segments.description: Segment IDs targeted by the campaign.

actions.name: get_group
actions.description: Get one Sender group by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for getting one Sender group.

active_phone_count.description: Active phone recipients in the group.

modified.description: When Sender last modified the group.

is_recalculating_subscribers.description: Whether Sender is recalculating group subscribers.

actions.name: get_subscriber
actions.description: Get one Sender subscriber by email address, phone number, or ID.

identifier.description: The subscriber email address, phone number, or Sender ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for getting one Sender subscriber.

created.description: When Sender created the subscriber record.

anyOf.description: When the subscriber bounced, when present.
When the subscriber unsubscribed, when present.

location.description: Location details returned by Sender, when present.

items.description: A Sender group tag attached to a subscriber.

columns.description: Custom field values returned by Sender.

actions.name: get_workflow
actions.description: Get one Sender automation workflow by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for getting one Sender workflow.

actions.name: list_campaigns
actions.description: List Sender campaigns with pagination and an optional status filter.

limit.description: Number of records to return per page.

anyOf.description: When the campaign is scheduled, when present.

last_action.description: The last campaign action recorded by Sender.

anyOf.description: When the campaign was sent, when present.

modified.description: When Sender last modified the campaign.

sent_count.description: Total sent emails reported by Sender.

campaign_groups.description: Group IDs targeted by the campaign.

segments.description: Segment IDs targeted by the campaign.

campaigns.description: The Sender campaigns returned for this page.

anyOf.description: The first item number on this page.

path.description: The request path reported by Sender.

per_page.description: The number of records per page.

anyOf.description: The last item number on this page.

hasMoreResources.description: Whether Sender reports another page after this one.

actions.name: list_workflows
actions.description: List Sender automation workflows with pagination and filters.

limit.description: Number of workflows to return per page (1-100).

title.description: Only return workflows whose title starts with this string.

workflows.description: The Sender workflows returned for this page.

anyOf.description: The first item number on this page.

path.description: The request path reported by Sender.

per_page.description: The number of records per page.

hasMoreResources.description: Whether Sender reports another page after this one.

actions.name: remove_subscribers_from_group
actions.description: Remove subscribers or a Sender conditions selection from a group.

subscribers.description: Email addresses to add or remove from the group.

conditions.description: Sender conditions expression for selecting subscribers.

inputSchema.description: Input for removing subscribers from a Sender group.

success.description: Whether Sender accepted the group membership change.

outputSchema.description: A Sender group membership mutation response.

actions.name: update_subscriber

identifier.description: The subscriber email address, phone number, or Sender ID.

groups.description: Sender group IDs assigned to the subscriber.

additionalProperties.description: A custom field value accepted by Sender.

fields.description: Custom field values keyed by Sender field name.

phone.description: The subscriber phone number with country code.

trigger_automation.description: Whether Sender should trigger automations for this change.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a Sender subscriber by email, phone number, or ID.

success.description: Whether Sender accepted the subscriber change.

created.description: When Sender created the subscriber record.

When the subscriber unsubscribed, when present.
